title: Lunch & Laughs at Pioneer Park
description: Enjoy a midday mix of lunch and laughs at Pioneer Park featuring free stand-up comedy sets and a touch of live music. Plus, the first 20 guests will receive a free sandwich, made to order courtesy of Mirabelle by Orphée in Pioneer Square! Lunch & Laughs will take place from noon-2 p.m. on the third Wednesday of each month through September.

title: Carving Demonstration with Ed Archie NoiseCat
description: Shuswap/ Stlitlimx artist Ed Archie NoiseCat will be performing a carving demonstration at Stonington Gallery on Saturday, May 23rd, from 2-4 pm (free to the public to attend)! Ed Archie NoiseCat grew up in British Columbia’s remote, mountainous interior with his mother’s people, the Canim Lake Band of Shuswap Indians. He draws inspiration from his mother’s plateau culture and from his father’s people, the Stlitlimx, closer to the coast. He draws on the stories of his ancestors to create innovative images executed with extraordinary craftsmanship.

title: Occidental Square Trading Post
description: The Occidental Square Trading Post returns for 2026! This outdoor Saturday market in the heart of historic Pioneer Square features local vendors selling handmade, antique and vintage goods. Watch out for updates on Instagram. The market will pop up in Occidental Square on the following dates from noon-6 p.m.: • April 25 • May 30 • Sept. 12 • Oct. 17 • Dec. 12

title: Chapel Lounge Art Walk Fashion Market - June 4th
description:
Join Seattle Designers for another night of Art Walk Fashion. 

June 4th we welcome all Artists, Clothing designers, Upcyclers and Vintage resellers welcome. We hope to see you there!

title: First Thursday Sunset Markets
description: Stop by the Sunset Market during Art Walk to shop unique and vintage treasures, every First Thursday! Check out the market every month from 5-9 p.m., featuring new surprises from rotating vendors. The market will pop up on the following dates: • April 2 • May 7 • June 4 • Aug. 6 • Sept. 3 • Oct. 1

title: June OxWash Art Walk Night Market
description: Pioneer Square Art Walk pop-up vendor locations in the OxWash neighborhood. Reserve your spot to pop-up in front of participating businesses around Occidental and Washington. From Bon Voyage Vintage to Saveway Market.
requirements: Bring your own Table and Chairs
